labelsRequired.message: ❌ Please add labels to this PR

messages.do not merge: ❌ PR is marked as Do Not Merge
messages.work in progress: ❌ PR is marked as Work in Progress
messages.wip: ❌ PR is marked as Work in Progress

descriptionRequired.message: ❌ Please provide a meaningful summary in the Pull Request description

groups.message: ❌ Has not passed code review (needs 'review passed' or 'code review passed' label)
❌ Has not passed QA (needs 'QA passed' label)

baseBranchAllowed.message: ❌ PR base branch is not allowed (currently: {baseRef}). Allowed: {allowed}

bigPrWarning.message: ⚠️ Big PR: {additions} additions + {deletions} deletions = {totalChanges} total changes

wipCommitMessages.message: ❌ PR is a Work in Progress (commit message contains 'WIP')

mergeCommits.message: ❌ Please rebase to remove merge commits in this PR

fixupCommits.message: ❌ Contains fixup or squash commits - please squash them before merging

meaningfulCommitMessages.message: ❌ Contains commits with non-meaningful messages (too short, generic, or temporary)

branchUpToDate.message: ❌ Branch is {commitsBehind} commits behind {baseRef} (max allowed: {max}). Please rebase.

sensitiveInfoInBody.message: ❌ PR description may contain sensitive information (passwords, secrets, tokens)
